'''shodhakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadragesimal|quadragesimal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-dh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadragesimal|quadragesimal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shodhakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shodhakithi|shodhakithi]] || [[word:shodhakiji|shodhakiji]] || [[word:shodhakishi|shodhakishi]] || [[word:shodhakiki|shodhakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shodhakuthuthu|shodhakuthuthu]] || [[word:shodhakujuju|shodhakujuju]] || [[word:shodhakushushu|shodhakushushu]] || [[word:shodhakukuku|shodhakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shodhakuthu|shodhakuthu]] || [[word:shodhakuju|shodhakuju]] || [[word:shodhakushu|shodhakushu]] || [[word:shodhakuku|shodhakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shodhakufthuf|shodhakufthuf]] || [[word:shodhakufjuf|shodhakufjuf]] || [[word:shodhakufshuf|shodhakufshuf]] || [[word:shodhakufkuf|shodhakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shodhakethe|shodhakethe]] || [[word:shodhakeje|shodhakeje]] || [[word:shodhakeshe|shodhakeshe]] || [[word:shodhakeke|shodhakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shodhakothotho|shodhakothotho]] || [[word:shodhakojojo|shodhakojojo]] || [[word:shodhakoshosho|shodhakoshosho]] || [[word:shodhakokoko|shodhakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shodhakotho|shodhakotho]] || [[word:shodhakojo|shodhakojo]] || [[word:shodhakosho|shodhakosho]] || [[word:shodhakoko|shodhakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shodhakofthof|shodhakofthof]] || [[word:shodhakofjof|shodhakofjof]] || [[word:shodhakofshof|shodhakofshof]] || [[word:shodhakofkof|shodhakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shodhakĂŻfthĂŻf|shodhakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhakĂŻfjĂŻf|shodhakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhakĂŻfshĂŻf|shodhakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhakĂŻfkĂŻf|shodhakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shodhakĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|shodhakĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhakĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|shodhakĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhakĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|shodhakĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhakĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|shodhakĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shodhakĂŻfthĂŻf|shodhakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhakĂŻfjĂŻf|shodhakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhakĂŻfshĂŻf|shodhakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhakĂŻfkĂŻf|shodhakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shodhakĂŻfthĂŻf|shodhakĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhakĂŻfjĂŻf|shodhakĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhakĂŻfshĂŻf|shodhakĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:shodhakĂŻfkĂŻf|shodhakĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shodhakĂŠthĂŠ|shodhakĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:shodhakĂŠjĂŠ|shodhakĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:shodhakĂŠshĂŠ|shodhakĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:shodhakĂŠkĂŠ|shodhakĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shodhakathatha|shodhakathatha]] || [[word:shodhakajaja|shodhakajaja]] || [[word:shodhakashasha|shodhakashasha]] || [[word:shodhakakaka|shodhakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shodhakatha|shodhakatha]] || [[word:shodhakaja|shodhakaja]] || [[word:shodhakasha|shodhakasha]] || [[word:shodhakaka|shodhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shodhakafthaf|shodhakafthaf]] || [[word:shodhakafjaf|shodhakafjaf]] || [[word:shodhakafshaf|shodhakafshaf]] || [[word:shodhakafkaf|shodhakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shodhakasha|shodhakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shodhakshĂ«sha|shodhakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shodhakrosha|shodhakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shodhakmusha|shodhakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shodhakyasha|shodhakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshodhaknkshĂ«sha|goshodhaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshodhaknkrosha|goshodhaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshodhaknkmusha|goshodhaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshodhaknkyasha|goshodhaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shodhadhakasha|shodhadhakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shodhadhakshĂ«sha|shodhadhakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shodhadhakrosha|shodhadhakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shodhadhakmusha|shodhadhakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shodhadhakyasha|shodhadhakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshodhadhaknkshĂ«sha|goshodhadhaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshodhadhaknkrosha|goshodhadhaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshodhadhaknkmusha|goshodhadhaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshodhadhaknkyasha|goshodhadhaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shedhĂŠkasha|shedhĂŠkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shedhĂŠkshĂ«sha|shedhĂŠkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shedhĂŠkrosha|shedhĂŠkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shedhĂŠkmusha|shedhĂŠkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shedhĂŠkyasha|shedhĂŠkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshedhĂŠknkshĂ«sha|goshedhĂŠknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshedhĂŠknkrosha|goshedhĂŠknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshedhĂŠknkmusha|goshedhĂŠknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshedhĂŠknkyasha|goshedhĂŠknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shodhfakasha|shodhfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shodhfakshĂ«sha|shodhfakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shodhfakrosha|shodhfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shodhfakmusha|shodhfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shodhfakyasha|shodhfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshodhfaknkshĂ«sha|goshodhfaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshodhfaknkrosha|goshodhfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshodhfaknkmusha|goshodhfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshodhfaknkyasha|goshodhfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
